arabic_text:
روح
محرک
فلک محیط
حرکت
فلک بروج
زحل مشتری مریخ
شمس زہرہ عطارد قمر
امہات
سقراء
معدن
نبات (نمو)
حیوان (حس)
انسان (نطق)
جسم
english_text:
Universal Soul
Mover
Encompassing Sphere
Motion
Sphere of the Zodiac
Saturn Jupiter Mars
Sun Venus Mercury Moon
Universal Matter
Matter of Nature
Mineral
Plant (growth)
Animal (sense)
Human (speech)
Universal Body
alt_text: A figure-shaped cosmological diagram with 'UNIVERSAL SOUL' (روح) at top and 'UNIVERSAL BODY' (جسم) at bottom. Five descending layers labeled MOTION, MIXTURE, STATION, and SOLIDIFICATION show emanation from Mover (محرک) through the celestial spheres (Encompassing Sphere, Sphere of the Zodiac), planets (Saturn-Moon), elements (Ummahaat — Mothers), minerals, plants (with faculty of growth), animals (sense), and finally humans (speech/reason).
notes: Classical Ikhwan-al-Safa / Ismaili cosmological diagram showing the chain of emanation from the Universal Soul to the Universal Body. The 'STATION' label سقراء may be a non-standard transliteration; if Phase 0b refines, suggest 'سکراء' or contextual verification. The figure outline behind the labels is a human body silhouette, emphasizing the macrocosm-microcosm correspondence.
